mundo.titulo: Government promises to act after 'shocking' failings in maternity care in England
mundo.resumen: An independent inquiry has found "unacceptable racism and discrimination" is affecting patient safety.

mundo.titulo: Refugees would be told to repay around £10,000 under new asylum bill
mundo.resumen: The Home Office will be given powers to recover costs from adults who have received asylum support under new laws.

mundo.titulo: Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
mundo.resumen: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
A 55-year-old law means the government has no legal powers to remove Shabir Ahmed from the UK.

mundo.titulo: Another UK heatwave could be on the way
mundo.resumen: As parts of Europe continue to swelter in record temperatures, higher temperatures could develop again across the UK later this week, as Simon King explains.

mundo.titulo: One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
mundo.resumen: While Trump celebrated a ruling expanding presidential power to remove and replace regulators, other decisions were major setbacks.

negocios.titulo: Homes harder to sell as high mortgage rates frustrate buyers
negocios.resumen: Three in five homes listed for sale since January remain on the market, says property portal Zoopla.

negocios.titulo: We had packed lunches every day for 10 years and retired at 40
negocios.resumen: The Fire (Financially Independent, Retire Early) movement sees followers save as much as possible.

negocios.titulo: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
negocios.resumen: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.

negocios.titulo: Hollywood director gets two and a half years in prison for defrauding Netflix
negocios.resumen: He was accused of using money for a Netflix show on lavish purchases like Rolls Royces and Ferraris.

negocios.titulo: Shetland backs plan to connect islands with £1.5bn undersea tunnels
negocios.resumen: The undersea links between some of the UK's most northerly islands could be in place within eight years.

negocios.titulo: India's biggest share sales tell the story of a country glued to its phones
negocios.resumen: NSE and Jio Platforms embody the sweeping changes in how India has consumed, invested and transacted over the past decade.

tecnologia.titulo: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
tecnologia.resumen: OKX is bringing together payments, identity and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

tecnologia.titulo: The AI jobs debate just got messier
tecnologia.resumen: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

tecnologia.titulo: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
tecnologia.resumen: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

tecnologia.titulo: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
tecnologia.resumen: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

tecnologia.titulo: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
tecnologia.resumen: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

tecnologia.titulo: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
tecnologia.resumen: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

tecnologia.titulo: Meet the lawyer who beat Elon Musk — twice
tecnologia.resumen: Watching Elon Musk fulminate at Bill Savitt during Musk v. Altman - the case in which Musk sued Sam Altman and OpenAI instead of seeing a therapist about his AI failures - was a bit like watching a toddler have a temper tantrum at his nursery school teacher. Savitt's questions were "designed to trick me," […]

tecnologia.titulo: This motor could be the future of e-bikes
tecnologia.resumen: Imagine an e-bike motor that lets you select your preferred pedaling cadence and then automatically adjusts the gears to keep your legs spinning at that exact speed, no matter how steep the hill gets - all without a fragile derailleur or heavy multi-speed cassette to maintain. Prefer manual control? No problem, you can have as […]

tecnologia.titulo: Our best look yet at Samsung’s new wide foldable
tecnologia.resumen: Samsung is expected to unveil its next generation of foldables at a Galaxy Unpacked event next month, but now we know what they might look like, courtesy of some leaked images published by Android Headlines. Images shared by the publication include case designs for two new Galaxy Z Fold 8 models and the Galaxy Z […]

tecnologia.titulo: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
tecnologia.resumen: Earlier today, T-Mobile started notifying customers that it will be retiring many legacy plans and moving subscribers onto one of its current rate plans. This move includes plans that date back to the 3G era, and it's going about as well as you'd expect. Affected customers began sharing screenshots of the text on reddit and […]

tecnologia.titulo: After a great start, DC’s new cinematic universe is already slowing down
tecnologia.resumen: While Kara Zor-El's appearance at the end of James Gunn's Superman was a very pleasant surprise, Warner Bros. Discovery's plan to fast-track a standalone Supergirl feature always felt a little dubious. It seemed odd that, after Superman, the studio wanted to flesh out its new cinematic universe with films about another Kryptonian and one of […]

tecnologia.titulo: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
tecnologia.resumen: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos and parts lists appeared on the dark web following a data breach affecting one of Apple's key suppliers, according to a report from Reuters. The leaked images show a drop test of what a source tells Reuters is the iPhone 18 Pro, equipped with a three-camera layout and Apple logo. […]
